question: Give me the works of chamber genre that involves at most violin, clarinet and piano
sparql: SELECT ?work WHERE { ?work <http://data.doremus.org/ontology#U13_has_casting> ?casting . ?casting <rdfs:comment> ?comment . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?comment), 'violin') && CONTAINS(LCASE(?comment), 'clarinet') && CONTAINS(LCASE(?comment), 'piano')) } LIMIT 10
execution_result: Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.22s
